metadata.description: Public marketplace for Claude Code plugins and MCP clients from CE Dot Net

plugins.name: ace
plugins.description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.4.2: Silent-failure telemetry for ace-cli subprocess errors (non-zero exit, JSON parse failure, timeout) now logged to canonical ace-relevance.jsonl stream as event=error. Diagnostics-only; no behavior change. Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.15.0.
